---
title: "Probability Distribution Explorer"
description: "Interactive reference for eight essential probability distributions with live parameter sliders."
date: 2026-05-08
categories: [distributions, statistics, inference, philosophy]
image: distributions.png
---

*The tool is not first.*
*Know what you are building, then*
*reach into the box.*

An interactive reference for eight essential probability distributions.
Adjust the parameters with live sliders, toggle between PDF and CDF
views, and see how mean and variance relate for each one.

A companion to the post
[Distributions and Data Generating Processes](/posts/2026-05-09-distributions-and-data-generating-processes/).

<!-- ```{=html} -->
<!-- <iframe -->
<!--   src="probability-distributions-interactive.html" -->
<!--   width="100%" -->
<!--   height="820px" -->
<!--   style="border:none; border-radius:10px; margin-top:1rem;"> -->
<!-- </iframe> -->
<!-- ``` -->


```{=html}
<a href="probability-distributions-interactive.html"
   target="_blank"
   style="display:inline-block; margin-bottom:1.25rem; padding:8px 18px;
          background:#5a7a6a; color:white; border-radius:6px;
          text-decoration:none; font-size:14px; font-family:sans-serif;">
  Open in full screen &#8599;
</a>

<iframe
  src="probability-distributions-interactive.html"
  width="100%"
  height="820px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:10px; display:block;">
</iframe>
```
